scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:40006@10.133.48.237 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:40006@10.133.48.237;tag=1 To: sip:[field0]@sbcdev4.com Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;q=0;expires=3600;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:00";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:d2336786-cc37-3710-ee15-6984a96f699e>";reg-id=1 Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
